series_metadata.series_description: This file contains the original application pertaining to the supplier receiving a permit to supply their products within the state of Ohio. The permit is renewed yearly and the renewal application and the copy of the renewal is included in the file.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper files are kept for 6 months ; Electronic: Out of State Supplier Applications are processed then the data is entered into ABCS (Alcohol Beverage Control System). Maintain machine-readable records on the ABCS computer database until superseded or until record series is no longer created. After data is entered into ABCS, these documents are scanned into LITS (License Issuance Tracking System) a computereized optical scanning Image System and continually updated. LITS images are stored forever and then saved to a (WORM) drive - write once, read many. These images are never purged., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
